query:
_index=sec_signal 
| json field=fullRecords "[0].metadata_vendor" as vendor nodrop
| json field=fullRecords "[0].metadata_product" as product nodrop
| json field=entities "[0].type" as entity_type nodrop
| where vendor = "Microsoft"
| count by  contentType, name, matchExpression, severity,vendor,product, entity_type
| sort by _count,name,severity

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides Signals analysis by product, vendor, and summary of  CSE Signals.
